--- Metallic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster --- HP: 11/59 | AC: 13
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/59). Going invisible for survival.

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
